---
title: "Monte Vista Dairy"
subtitle: "Monthly Report"
author: "<img src='milestones_dairy/images/ac logo.jpeg' width='150' /> <br> Animal Clinic LLC"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    theme: flatly
    df_print: paged
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    number-sections: false
    code-fold: true
execute:
  message: false
  warning: false
  echo: false
embed-resources: true
params:
  event:
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

if (!require("pacman")) install.packages("pacman")
pacman::p_load(
  broom,
  tidyverse,
  dtplyr,
  gt,
  arrow,
  rmarkdown,
  lubridate,
  quarto, 
  arrow,
  survival,
  survminer,
  ggsurvfit,
  flextable,
  gtsummary,
  marginaleffects,
  scales,
  zoo,
  here
  )

events_formatted <- read_parquet(here::here('data/intermediate_files/events_formatted.parquet'))

animals <- read_parquet(here::here('data/intermediate_files/animals.parquet'))

animal_lactations<-read_parquet(here::here('data/intermediate_files/animal_lactations.parquet'))

# load GC's functions
source(here::here("functions/fxn_load_os_fxns.R"))
fxn_load_os_fxns()

source('functions/fxn_denos_sarah.R')
herd_deno <- fxn_denos_sarah(
  lact_data = animal_lactations, 
  events_df = events_formatted, 
  animal_data = animals)

source('functions/fxn_denominators_monthly.R')
monthly_deno_data <- fxn_get_monthly_denominators(animal_lactations, animals)

# Load Parnell CR fucntions from Github
cr_url <- "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ParnellPharma/ParnellFunctionsPublic/main/parnell_calculate_CR_master.R"
source(cr_url)

# create variables for inline code
farm_name <- unique(events_formatted$location_event)

date_max_pull <- max(events_formatted$date_event, na.rm = TRUE)
date_min_pull <- date_max_pull - years(2)


farm_name <- basename(farm_name)

farm_name <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(farm_name)

farm_name <- str_replace_all(farm_name, "[_|-]", " ") |> str_to_title()


```

# Report for `r farm_name`

-   This report shows data from 
   `r date_min_pull()` to `r date_max_pull`.

# Herd Demographics:

```{r}
# Denominator files:
denos <-read_parquet(here::here('data/intermediate_files/herd_denominators.parquet'))

denos_dim <-read_parquet(here::here('data/intermediate_files/herd_dim_denominators.parquet'))

denos_season <- read_parquet(here::here('data/intermediate_files/herd_season_denominators.parquet'))


```




```{r}
#| label: solution_data
#| echo: TRUE


# 0. Configuration
fresh_dates <- events_formatted %>%
  filter(event == "BORN") %>%
  group_by(id_animal, id_animal_lact) %>%
  summarise(date_fresh = min(date_event, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

events_formatted <- events_formatted %>%
  left_join(
    animals %>% select(id_animal, date_left, date_sold, date_died),
    by = "id_animal"
  )

all_lesions <- c(
  "dd", "footrot", "wld", "sole_ulcer", "injury",
  "cork", "other", "hemorrhage", "sole_fracture",
  "toe_ulcer", "thin", "inf", "noninf",
  "toe", "axial", "lesion"
)

diseases <- c("inf", "noninf", "lesion")

# 1. Format
lame_data <- events_formatted %>%
  filter(event %in% c("LAME", "TRIM"))

lame_data <- lame_data |> 
  select(id_animal, id_animal_lact, date_left, lact_number, lact_group, 
         lact_group_basic, lact_group_5, event, location_event, dim_event, protocols_letters1, remark_letters1, date_event)

# 2. Lesion data
lame_data <- lame_data |> 
  fxn_code_lesions(
    event_var    = event,
    protocol_var = protocols_letters1,
    remark_var   = remark_letters1
  ) 

lame_data <- lame_data |> 
 mutate(
   noninf = case_when(
      str_detect(protocols_letters1, "^Ab") ~ 1,
      TRUE ~ 0   # default for all other rows
    )
  )

solution_data <- lame_data|>
  fxn_collapse_lesions(lesions = all_lesions) |>
  fxn_trim_vars(
    location_event,
    id_animal,
    date_var     = date_event,
    trimonly_var = trimonly
  ) |>
  fxn_dz_status(
    disease_cols = diseases,
    event_filter = trimonly == 0,
    gap = 1
  )

# 3. Culling

solution_data <- solution_data %>%
  group_by(id_animal) %>%
  arrange(date_event, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    next_event_date = lead(date_event),

    culled_last_trim = if_else(
      trimonly == 1 & !is.na(date_left) & (is.na(next_event_date) | next_event_date >= date_left),
      1L, 0L
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(-next_event_date)

solution_data <- solution_data |> 
  mutate(
    date_censor = max(date_event, na.rm = TRUE),
    days_to_cull = as.numeric(date_left - date_event),
    culled_ever = if_else(!is.na(days_to_cull), 1, 0),
    days_censor_cull = as.numeric(if_else(!is.na(date_left), date_left, date_censor) - date_event),
    culled_30   = if_else(!is.na(days_to_cull) & days_to_cull <= 30, 1, 0),
    dim_boxes     = case_when(
                    dim_event >= 270 ~ ">270",
                    dim_event >= 211 ~ "211-270",
                    dim_event >= 151 ~ "151-210",
                    dim_event >= 91  ~ "91-150",
                    dim_event >= 30  ~ "30-90",
                    dim_event >= 0   ~ "<30",
                    TRUE             ~ NA_character_
                  ),
  ) 

```
